compiled_state.title: RED: test overlay parallel dispatch reads overlay-flags.env and fires curl per active flag
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Testing mode: RED

Write failing tests in tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh (after the existing 22 assertions) that verify:
1. When overlay-flags.env contains security_overlay=true, the runner fires a curl call to the Anthropic API using code-reviewer-security-red-team.md as the system prompt and writes output to reviewer-findings-security-red.json in WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR.
2. When overlay-flags.env contains performance_overlay=true, the runner fires a curl call using code-reviewer-performance.md and writes to reviewer-findings-performance.json.
3. When overlay-flags.env contains test_quality_overlay=true, the runner fires a curl call using code-reviewer-test-quality.md and writes to reviewer-findings-test-quality.json.
4. When all three flags are false, no overlay slot files are created.

Use mock curl scripts that capture which system prompt was used (via --data-raw body inspection) and write slot files. Tests must FAIL against the current runner (no overlay dispatch implemented yet).

Files touched: tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh
